overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval gothic-style classroom or study hall with students seated at wooden desks, rendered in a game engine. The scene features high vaulted stone ceilings, tall arched windows at the far end, and atmospheric lighting filtering through the windows.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic-style classroom with high vaulted ceilings and stone walls. Students sit at wooden desks on either side of a central blue carpet, studying quietly. Natural light filters through tall arched windows at the far end, illuminating the chalkboard and bookshelves lining the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic-style classroom that emphasizes the stillness and scholarly atmosphere of the environment. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, highlighting the high vaulted ceilings and heavy stone walls. The perspective settles on students seated at wooden desks flanking a central blue carpet, where they study in quiet concentration. As the eye moves deeper into the space, the scene opens toward the far end of the hall, where natural light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate a chalkboard and bookshelves lining the walls.
